name: io.github.hassanahashish-design/agent-signals-mcp
description: Hiring signals, SEC EDGAR filings, research papers, GitHub repos & Hacker News as flat citation-ready JSON for AI agents. Pay-per-result via Apify; empty lookups cost $0.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Apify API token as 'Bearer <token>' — get one free at console.apify.com/account/integrations; usage billed pay-per-result to your Apify account
